Interface IDimensionalDefinition

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that define a multidimensional value object.

[Guid("30E433E7-F5B1-4595-93FC-E3A3A16E1889")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDimensionalDefinition

Properties

DimensionName

A string defining the name of the dimension.

string DimensionName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumValues

The array of maximum values for this dimension. These values are optional

IDoubleArray MaximumValues { get; set; }

Property Value

IDoubleArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinimumValues

The array of minimum values for this dimension.

IDoubleArray MinimumValues { get; set; }

Property Value

IDoubleArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Properties

Additional properties associated with a dimensional definition.

IPropertySet Properties { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

VariableName

A string defining the name of the variable. This property is optional.

string VariableName { get; set; }

Property Value

string
